neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel

Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization
 

  • Uses of NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel in neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.depressurization that return NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.setFireExposure(double emissivity, double flameTempK, double convCoeff, double exposedAreaM2)
    Configures the radiative-convective fire boundary condition acting on the wall.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.setInsideGasCoefficient(double insideGasCoefficient)
    Sets the inside vapour-side wall film coefficient.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.setInterfacial(double coefficient, double areaM2)
    Sets the gas–liquid interfacial heat-transfer coefficient and interface area.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.setLatentHeat(double latentHeat)
    Sets the latent heat of vaporization used for the boil-off mass transfer.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.setMaxTime(double tMax)
    Sets the maximum simulation time.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.setStopPressure(double pMin)
    Sets the stop pressure.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.setTimeStep(double dt)
    Sets the integration time step.
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel
    NonEquilibriumBlowdownModel.setWall(double wallMass, double wallSpecificHeat)
    Configures the lumped wall thermal mass.
